sourcesContent:
import {BrowserRouter as Router, Routes, Route, Navigate} from 'react-router-dom'

import Login from './pages/Login'
import Home from './pages/Home'
import Road from './pages/Road'
import Sing from './pages/sings/Sings'
import AddSing from './pages/sings/AddSing'
import EditSing from './pages/sings/EditSing'
import RoadSing from './pages/Road_Sing'
import TypeCrossroad from './pages/TypeCrossroad'

import './App.css';


function App() {
  return (
    <Router>
      <Routes>
        <Route path='/' element={<Navigate to='/login' replace />} />

        <Route path='/login' element={<Login />} />

        <Route path='/main' element={<Home />} />

        <Route path='/roads' element={<Road />} />

        <Route path='/sings' element={<Sing />} />
        <Route path='/sing/add' element={<AddSing />} />
        <Route path='/sing/edit/:id' element={<EditSing />} />

        <Route path='/roads/sings' element={<RoadSing />} />

        <Route path='/type_crossroad' element={<TypeCrossroad />} />
        
      </Routes>
    </Router>
  );
}

export default App;
